front.title: In-Network Aggregation Framework with Virtual Aggregation Tree and BIER

abstract.t: AllReduce is a critical performance bottleneck for distributed deep learning and large model training in data centers for AI computing. In-Network Aggregation (INA) has been identified as an effective accelerating technique to improve its performance. The draft describes a flexible and efficient INA solution for packet routing and forwarding. The forward aggregation tree is encoded by a bitmap. The result dissemination is through BIER-based multicast which also relies on a bitmap. The two bitmaps share the same encoding scheme as specified in BIER.
